summary.title: Professional Summary
summary.content: Certified Scrum Master and Agile Coach with 10+ years guiding teams to deliver value through iterative and collaborative practices. Experienced facilitator of ceremonies, sprint planning, retrospectives, and continuous improvement. Skilled in aligning cross-functional teams around shared outcomes, removing impediments, and improving process flows. Combines systems thinking with team empowerment to create resilient, high-performing teams.

items.name: Agile Facilitation
items.proficiency: Lead sprint planning, stand-ups, reviews, and retrospectives to ensure team alignment and delivery cadence.

items.name: Team Coaching
items.proficiency: Coach teams on Agile principles, continuous improvement, and self-organization.

items.name: Stakeholder Engagement
items.proficiency: Align product owners, developers, and stakeholders around shared goals and measurable outcomes.

items.name: Process Optimization
items.proficiency: Identify and remove impediments, streamline workflows, and embed continuous improvement.

items.description:
• Facilitated cross-functional agile teams to deliver iterative learning modules and simulations.
  • Led sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospectives to remove impediments and accelerate delivery.
  • Coached students and educators in Scrum and Agile practices, increasing delivery predictability and team ownership.
  • Introduced feedback loops and workflow improvements to streamline project execution across departments.

• Coached internal teams on collaborative planning, adaptive delivery, and incremental value creation.
  • Facilitated agile ceremonies with distributed contributors to align outcomes with strategic goals.
  • Designed frameworks for iterative development of governance tooling, improving team coherence and cycle time.

• Introduced agile methods into curriculum design and lab operations.
  • Facilitated team sprints combining multiple courses into a cohesive project cycle using SafeScrum.
  • Coached student teams on iterative delivery and collaborative problem solving.

• Delivered agile simulations and sprint-based learning frameworks to student teams.
  • Created systems thinking exercises that reinforced iterative problem solving and team adaptation.

items.name: Value Chain Hackers AI Lab
items.description: Led agile teams to design and deploy AI-powered tools using iterative cycles and cross-functional collaboration.

items.name: Agile Supply Chain Simulations
items.description: Designed and facilitated Agile simulation modules that taught iterative planning and feedback loops to learners.

items.name: Scrum & Agile Frameworks
items.proficiency: Sprint planning, reviews, retrospectives, backlog prioritization.

items.name: Facilitation
items.proficiency: Team ceremonies, stakeholder alignment, workshop design.

items.name: Coaching & Mentoring
items.proficiency: Agile coaching, team development, conflict resolution.
